dauTooltip: Distinct users who sent at least one message in the last 24 hours. Includes activity from deleted chats.
dauOverTimeTooltip: Distinct users who sent at least one user message on each calendar day over the last 90 days. Includes activity from deleted chats.
mauOverTimeTooltip: Distinct users who sent at least one user message in each calendar month over the last 12 months. Includes activity from deleted chats.
seatsUtilizationTooltip: Total users divided by total seats across all linked subscriptions, including suspended teams.
seatsDistributionTooltip: Number of subscriptions grouped by seat count.
sanitizationDescription: Sanitization removes sensitive information from your prompts before they're processed. If you turn this off, your prompts won't be cleaned, which may expose confidential data.
dataRetentionDescription: Control how long conversations should be retained in {brandShortName}.
unsubscribeDescription: By unsubscribing, all users in your team will lose access to {brandName} from the next billing cycle. You will lose access to all data by 60 days.
paymentMethodRequiredReactivate: You need to add a payment method to reactivate subscription.
teamBlockedSupport: Your team is blocked from resuming subscription. If you think this is a mistake, please reach out to us on our <link>support page</link>.
deleteTeamDescription: Permanently delete this team and all its data — including users, custom AIs and comments.
deleteAccountSubtitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
accountDeactivatedMessage: Your account has been deactivated and all the data will be deleted within 30 days.
teamBannedAndDeletedMessage: Your banned team account has been deleted. All data will be permanently removed within 30 days.
llmControlsDescription: Manage which LLMs are available to your team and its users. Updates may take up to 10 minutes to apply.
allowCodeFileUploadDescription: Users can send files and code to all models in this provider
whitelistChangesNote: * Changes take upto 5 minutes to propagate
substitutionsDescription: Control how {brandShortName} sanitizes content for your team.
customAgentsTooltip: Your team has {count} custom agent that are currently active
threatsManagedTooltip: Sensitive data types that {brandShortName} has automatically redacted to safeguard your organization.
dailyUsageTooltip: Total usage across your team on a daily basis.
assistantUsageTooltip: The types of assistants used across your organization and their usage frequency.
agentUsageTooltip: The frequency and types of agents being used across your organization.
engineSwitchReasonsTooltip: Shows the reasons why chats switched to {engineDisplayName}.
gmpBillingMessage: Your Billing account is managed by Google Market Place. Click on the link below to manage your billing account.
verificationChargeNote: To verify your payment method, a temporary charge of $1.00 will be applied and refunded within the next hour.
paymentMethodDeleteTooltip: You can remove your payment method after this month's billing period ends. If you cancel your subscription, you will only be charged for the days the service was active.
paymentMethodDeleteBlockedTooltip: You cannot delete the payment method until you unsubscribe or delete Account.
teamBlockedAddPayment: Your team is blocked from adding payment methods. If you think this is a mistake, please reach out to us on our <link>support page</link>.
failedInitializePayment: Failed to initialize payment. Please try again.
errorProcessingPayment: Error processing payment. Please try again.
availableSeatsTooltip: Available seats are seats that have been purchased but are not yet assigned.
partnerBillingMessage: Your Billing account is managed by {brandName}. Click on the link below to manage your billing account.
disableIncognitoTeamDescription: Once disabled, audit logs will be recorded for admins. Individual users can still have Incognito mode enabled if needed. Updates may take up to 10 minutes to apply
enableIncognitoTeamDescription: When turned on, audit logs will not be saved for anyone. Updates may take up to 10 minutes to apply.
name: Name
incognitoAccessTooltip: When turned on, audit logs will not be saved for this user. Updates may take up to 10 minutes to apply
gmpOwnerCannotRemove: Google Marketplace owner cannot be removed
gmpOwnerAdminCannotChange: Google Marketplace owner admin status cannot be changed
noSeatsAvailable: No seats available. Please upgrade your plan to add more users.
onlySeatsAvailable: Only {count} seat(s) available. Please reduce the number of invitations.
inviteLimitMessage: You can only invite up to {count} user(s) with your current plan.
noRequestsYet: No requests have been raised yet!
noAuditLogsYet: No audit logs are present yet!
deleteConversationTitle: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this conversation?
deleteConversationBody: This conversation will no longer be accessible to the user. This action can not be undone.
sensitiveEntitiesFoundDescription: This conversation contains sensitive information. We've marked it as sensitive to protect your data.
noSensitiveDataFoundFull: No sensitive data was found in this conversation.
noRiskSensitiveEntityAssociation: No Risk of Sensitive Entity Association
noRiskSensitiveEntityAssociationShort: No risk of data association to entities.
noRiskSensitiveEntityAssociationFull: This content doesn't contain any sensitive information that can be linked to a specific person or organization. Since the data is generic or anonymized, it's considered safe and non-identifiable.
educationalOrHypotheticalUseShort: Entities are used in educational or hypothetical contexts.
educationalOrHypotheticalUseFull: This content is part of a training, learning, or hypothetical scenario. Any sensitive information used is for illustrative purposes and doesn't contain real or personal details.
lowSensitivityBroadApplicability: Low Sensitivity Due to Broad Applicability
lowSensitivityBroadApplicabilityShort: Detected entities are broad and general, not tied to specific individuals.
lowSensitivityBroadApplicabilityFull: This content uses common information, such as general demographic or health data that apply to broad populations and not a specific individual, they are not considered a privacy risk.
publiclyAvailableInformationShort: Contains only publicly available information and not private or confidential data.
publiclyAvailableInformationFull: This content uses public information. Although it references real individuals or organizations, the information is already accessible in news, official records or other public sources.
nonConfidentialBusinessInformationShort: Contains internal company info meant for reference but not confidential, posing no privacy or security risk.
nonConfidentialBusinessInformationFull: This content contains general company information. It's intended for internal use, but it's not confidential and doesn't pose a security or privacy risk.
healthcareQueryNoPii: Healthcare Query with No Associated PII
healthcareQueryNoPiiShort: Healthcare details are present, but without PII, so no individual can be identified.
healthcareQueryNoPiiFull: This content contains medical information, but it doesn't include any personal details like a name, ID, or contact information. This ensures your privacy is protected and the information can't be traced back to you.
sensitiveTopicOrIntentShort: Involves sensitive themes such as harassment, discrimination or mental health and requires careful handling.
sensitiveTopicOrIntentFull: This content addresses sensitive themes, such as harassment or discrimination. We're handling it carefully to ensure a safe and respectful environment.
banDomainInstruction: To ban a domain in launchdarkly, go to <link>here</link>.
sanitizedEncryptionPayingTeam: Sanitized Content Encryption for paying team
sanitizedEncryptionGmpTeam: Sanitized Content Encryption for Google Marketplace team
